overview: Skeleton Archer is a Normal-class Undead monster found in Crypt, Goblin Cave, Inferno, Ruins, Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 10 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. Has a Staggered reaction in its ability set. 5 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack1 at 200% ratio (200 base damage). Elite gains 2 exclusive abilityies: Elite Attack1, Elite Attack2. Nightmare gains 3 exclusive abilityies: Elite Attack1, Elite Attack2, Nightmare Attack3.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 5 melee attacks. Attack1 (200%), Attack2 (200%), Elite Attack1 (200%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Has Stagger Reaction (ImpactRes 3, Endurance 4)
strategies.description: This monster has a Staggered ability in its ability set, meaning it has a stagger reaction animation. ImpactResistance: 3, MaxImpactEndurance: 4.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2500), Divine (-2000), Earth (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Attack1 (200% ratio)
strategies.description: Attack1 deals 200 damage at base (200% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Elite Gains: Elite Attack1, Elite Attack2
strategies.description: Elite grade has 2 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Elite Attack1, Elite Attack2. These change the fight dynamics in Elite.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Elite Attack1, Elite Attack2, Nightmare Attack3
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 3 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Elite Attack1, Elite Attack2, Nightmare Attack3. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
Elite gains 2 exclusive abilities: Elite Attack1, Elite Attack2
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 3 exclusive abilities: Elite Attack1, Elite Attack2, Nightmare Attack3

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
